2026-06-29T18:32:35.7969836Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7971344Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7972759Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7973389Z 
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7973785Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7974705Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7975235Z 
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7975664Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-06-29T18:32:35.7976247Z

2026-06-29T18:32:35.7977269Z
